subject: [PATCH v7 1/2] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: Oscar Salvador (SUSE)
reviews.summary: Provided a Reviewed-by tag without any specific comments or feedback on the patch's technical merits.

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch series proposes to bypass the mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead, which is intended to stop speculative mmap readahead when a file looks like a random-access workload. The current implementation of the heuristic does not fit well with the VM_EXEC path and can lead to stale throttling of readahead behavior. The patch aims to match the existing treatment of VM_SEQ_READ mappings by skipping both increments and decrements of the mmap_miss counter for VM_EXEC mappings.
